zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie於1347年1月6日出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾休謨時，他的父親Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie26歲，母親Mariota Lochore23歲。他於1367年與Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1367年住在英國蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯。他去世於1395年在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie于1347年1月6日出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾休謨时，他的父亲Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie26岁，母亲Mariota Lochore23岁。他于1367年与Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1367年住在英国苏格兰費伏維梅斯。他去世于1395年在英国苏格兰費伏享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

variants.name: Buswell
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

variants.name: Biswell
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire): possibly from a lost or unidentified place called with Old English bēos ‘coarse grass’ + wella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, a variant of Boswell .

variants.name: Bussell
meanings: English: variant of   Boswell   (of Norman origin) or   Bissell   1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie was born on 6 January 1347, in Hume, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie, was 26 and his mother, Mariota Lochore, was 23. He married Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee in 1367, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He lived in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom in 1367. He died in 1395, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie est né le 6 janvier 1347, à Hume, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mariota Lochore, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee en 1367, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il a vécu à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni en 1367. Il est décédé en 1395, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.Balgregie, Fifeshire, Scotland: Fyfe Shore, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie am 6. Januar 1347 in Hume, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie 26 und seine Mutter Mariota Lochore 23. Er hat 1367 in Fife, Scotland Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1367 hat er in Wemyss, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1395 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie è nato il il 6 gennaio 1347 nel Hume, Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mariota Lochore, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee nel 1367, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Vissuto a Wemyss, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito nel 1367. Morì nel 1395, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregieが1347年1月6日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアヒューメで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregieは26歳，母Mariota Lochoreは23歳であった。1367年にスコットランドフィフでLady Margaret Melville of Cairnbeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1367年にはイギリススコットランドフィフウエムイスに住んでいた。彼は1395年にイギリススコットランドフィフで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie(이)가 1347년 1월 6일 스컷랜드 버윅실르 흄에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariota Lochore(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1367년 스컷랜드 피프에서 Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1367년도에 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 w미스에서 살았다. 그는 1395년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1347, em Hume, Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mariota Lochore, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee em 1367, em Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele viveu em Wemyss, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom em 1367. Ele faleceu em 1395, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie родился 6 января 1347 г. в местности хюм, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Boswell - First Lord of Balgregie было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariota Lochore, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee в 1367 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он жил в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в 1367 году. Он умер в 1395 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee en 1367, en Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Vivió en Wemyss, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido en 1367. Murió en 1395, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
